C:\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\simple_analyzer.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\simple_analyzer.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\simple_analyzer.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\simple_analyzer.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o simple_analyzer.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libsimple_analyzer.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\simple_analyzer.dir\linkLibs.rsp
